description_long: This is a classic straw boater hat, featuring a flat-topped crown and a wide, flat brim. The hat is constructed from tightly woven, light-colored straw, giving it a natural, slightly textured appearance. Around the base of the crown, there is a simple, light-colored band that adds a subtle accent without being overly decorative. The brim is broad and sharply defined, providing ample shade and a distinctive silhouette. The overall structure is rigid and maintains its shape well, typical of traditional boater hats. This style is often associated with summer attire and is commonly seen in urban parks, promenades, and outdoor gatherings.
description: A classic straw boater hat with a flat crown, wide flat brim, and a subtle band around the base. The hat is light-colored and has a natural woven texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat-topped crown, wide flat brim, and the light band encircling the crown.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the even width of the brim and the consistent woven straw texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and brim, with the band visible wrapping around the crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, similar to view 1, showing the uniformity of the brim and crown.
